tasks.subject: Task 1: i18n Infrastructure Refactor
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrate zh→zh-CN, refactor i18n/index.ts for 8-language dynamic loading, enable LanguageDetector

**Files:**
- Rename: `apps/client/src/i18n/locales/zh/` → `apps/client/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN/`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/i18n/index.ts`
- Create: `apps/client/src/i18n/loadLanguage.ts`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/i18n/i18next.d.ts`
- Test: `apps/client/src/i18n/__tests__/loadLanguage.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/i18n/index.ts", "apps/client/src/i18n/loadLanguage.ts", "apps/client/src/i18n/i18next.d.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client && npx vitest run src/i18n", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zh renamed to zh-CN", "8 languages in supportedLanguages", "dynamic loading via import.meta.glob", "LanguageDetector enabled", "zh→zh-CN localStorage compat"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Date/Time Formatting Utilities
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create locale-aware date/time formatting functions that follow the current i18n language

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/client/src/lib/date-format.ts`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/i18n/locales/en/common.json`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN/common.json`
- Test: `apps/client/src/lib/__tests__/date-format.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/lib/date-format.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client && npx vitest run src/lib/__tests__/date-format", "acceptanceCriteria": ["formatDate/formatTime/formatDateTime use Intl with current locale", "formatRelative returns locale-appropriate strings", "justNow key in common namespace"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: RelativeTime Component
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create RelativeTime component with hover tooltip and click-to-toggle

**Files:**
- Create: `apps/client/src/components/ui/RelativeTime.tsx`
- Test: `apps/client/src/components/ui/__tests__/RelativeTime.test.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/ui/RelativeTime.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client && npx vitest run src/components/ui/__tests__/RelativeTime", "acceptanceCriteria": ["displays relative time by default", "hover shows absolute tooltip", "click toggles display", "auto-updates interval"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Language Switcher UI Update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update language switcher to show all 8 languages with async loading

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/LanguageSwitcher.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/layout/MainSidebar.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/LanguageSwitcher.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/layout/MainSidebar.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client && npx vitest run src/components/layout/__tests__/MainSidebar", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 8 languages visible", "async changeLanguage with loading state", "no zh filter"]}
```

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/dialog/CreateChannelDialog.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/dialog/DeleteChannelDialog.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/dialog/CreateWorkspaceDialog.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/dialog/NewMessageDialog.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/dialog/AHandSetupDialog.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client && npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 5 dialogs use useTranslation", "no hardcoded user-facing strings", "existing keys reused"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Fix Date Formatting Across Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace all hardcoded locale date formatting with date-format.ts utilities

**Files:**
- Modify: date-utils.ts, ~15 component files with toLocaleString/toLocaleDateString/toLocaleTimeString

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/lib/date-utils.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client && grep -rn 'toLocaleString\\|toLocaleDateString\\|toLocaleTimeString\\|DateTimeFormat.*en-US' src/components src/routes --include='*.tsx' --include='*.ts' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v __tests__", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero hardcoded Intl.DateTimeFormat en-US calls", "zero bare toLocaleString calls", "date-utils.ts uses date-format.ts"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Generate Translation Files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create 72 translation JSON files (6 languages × 12 namespaces)

**Files:**
- Create: locales/zh-TW/*, locales/ja/*, locales/ko/*, locales/es/*, locales/fr/*, locales/de/* (72 files)

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/client/src/i18n/locales && for lang in zh-TW ja ko es fr de; do for ns in common auth navigation channel message settings thread workspace routines resources skills onboarding; do test -f $lang/$ns.json || echo MISSING: $lang/$ns.json; done; done", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 72 JSON files exist", "zh-TW uses proper Traditional Chinese vocabulary", "all keys match en/ structure", "valid JSON"]}
```
